Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Danielle’s children were taken out of her care after cops observed all 4 children, including her newborn, home alone. Her fifth and sixth babies were taken from her care, too. But she wants to prove that she could be a good mom!
Video.title: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Image.alt: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Video.summary: Jeremy hasn't seen his child in four years, but after coming clean, he wants to right the wrongs that he's done. Julie, his ex and mother of their child, doesn't buy it, claiming that he spends more time with his new girlfriends child than his own.
Video.title: Why Aren't You A Father

Image.alt: Why Aren't You A Father
Why Aren't You A Father
Why Aren't You A Father

Video.summary: Heather is 17 years old and she says her boyfriend Anthony is the father of her child. But Anthony thinks his brother, Tracy is the father. Then, Roxana believes her two-year-old nephew was beaten by his mother Kyesha.
Video.title: Did He Abuse My Son?

Image.alt: Did He Abuse My Son?
Did He Abuse My Son?
Did He Abuse My Son?

Video.summary: According to Drew, the baby was bottle-fed gin and died. Shawn, the grieving mother, claims she had no prior knowledge of the bottle containing gin and believes it was tampered with, possibly by her own sister and friend. Who’s responsible?
Video.title: A Fatal Mistake

Image.alt: A Fatal Mistake
A Fatal Mistake
A Fatal Mistake

Video.summary: Cassey believes she recently uncovered her ex-husband Calvin’s evil deeds, which he was trying to cover up with gifts for his daughter, but did he actually molest her daughter? Or has she had it all wrong?
Video.title: I Want Justice for My Daughter

Image.alt: I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter

Video.summary: Brandon spent time in jail after being accused of sexually abusing his niece. He maintains his innocence and claims that this isn’t the first time his niece has accused someone of molestation! Was she coached by his sister’s boyfriend Billy?
Video.title: Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Image.alt: Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Video.summary: Valarie is here to get custody of her children because she says their father Roy has been abusing them. Roy says that it's her boyfriend who is the abuser. Then, Jennifer is here to because she want's her sister Amber to leave her boyfriend Ceasarae.
Video.title: I've Seen Him Hit Her

Image.alt: I've Seen Him Hit Her
I've Seen Him Hit Her
I've Seen Him Hit Her

Video.summary: Lorie gave birth to twin boys, and while she initially thought boyfriend Carlos was the father, she would later believe it was actually Warren, a claim he strongly denies. Warren wants Lorie to stop harassing him about being the father.
Video.title: I Hope I'm Not The Father

Image.alt: I Hope I'm Not The Father
I Hope I'm Not The Father
I Hope I'm Not The Father

Video.summary: Vanessa reveals a hidden secret from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to see if he fathered Mel’s son!
Video.title: A Shocking Statement

Image.alt: A Shocking Statement
A Shocking Statement
A Shocking Statement

Video.summary: Latonya says her wife told her she was raped and became pregnant with triplets, but doctors later said she was never pregnant.
Video.title: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Image.alt: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: A woman acts as her daughter's pimp; a man's mother and girlfriend feud.
Video.title: Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk

Image.alt: Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk
Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk
Aspiring Prostitutes & a Drunk

Video.summary: Deshawn is engaged to his baby's mother, but it did not stop him from hooking up with his friend; Quan must reveal a secret to his fiancee; Makayla has a confession that could end her engagement.
Video.title: Grooms Full of Bologna

Image.alt: Grooms Full of Bologna
Grooms Full of Bologna
Grooms Full of Bologna

Video.summary: Mookie has a confession that could be a deal breaker; Kelvin assures his girlfriend that an encounter he had at a movie theater meant nothing; two women's feelings are mutual, but one of them has a boyfriend.
Video.title: Awkward Hook-Ups

Image.alt: Awkward Hook-Ups
Awkward Hook-Ups
Awkward Hook-Ups

Video.summary: Megan's sister knows something that could change her mind about her cheating boyfriend; Princess admits to having feelings for her ex; Brad's girlfriend wonders why his attitude toward her has changed.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Denial

Image.alt: Baby Daddy Denial
Baby Daddy Denial
Baby Daddy Denial

Video.summary: A Navy man suspects his girlfriend is cheating on him; a woman sleeps with her sister's boyfriend.
Video.title: A Navy Man & A Commie

Image.alt: A Navy Man & A Commie
A Navy Man & A Commie
A Navy Man & A Commie

Video.summary: Juice is here to reveal to Jessica that he’s a woman. Jolene has been sleeping with her sister’s girlfriend, Stephanie! Chante doesn’t approve of her sister’s fiancée and won’t hold her peace at their wedding!
Video.title: Lesbian Love Fest

Image.alt: Lesbian Love Fest
Lesbian Love Fest
Lesbian Love Fest

Video.summary: Melody is horrified that her sister is dating a 54 year old loser named Wolf.
Video.title: Holiday Hell Feast

Holiday Hell Feast

Video.summary: Sherry is furious that her ex friend seduced her teen son Nick. Angie confronts her husband's trans lover.

Hot Love Affairs

Video.summary: Jerry reveals he’s having an affair. Tenille wants to confront the woman sleeping with her baby’s father.

Video.summary: Jaycee teaches past guest Brandy that it’s never ok to cheat with a man and break up a family.

Video.summary: Which of Zee's relatives have been stealing her money? Is Diallo cheating on Michelle and stealing from her?

Video.summary: Monique is tired of her mom-in-law’s cheating accusations. Sandy finds a secret recording of Chris cheating.

Video.summary: Anna is a squasher an overweight woman who sits on men. Bobbie says that Stuart's obsession is harming Sindi!

I'm Scared Your Fetish Will Kill You!

Video.summary: Renee’s quest for the perfect butt almost cost her her life. Justin has had over 100 plastic surgeries.
